description: The Lamborghini Murciélago, produced from 2001 to 2010, is powered by a naturally aspirated V12 displacing 6.2 to 6.5 litres and producing 572 to 661 bhp. As the last Lamborghini flagship to offer a gated manual gearbox, well-maintained examples — particularly the LP640 and LP670-4 SV variants — are increasingly sought after by collectors. Manual gearbox cars command a significant premium over E-Gear automated variants.
